generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former civil defense coordinator, I've seen firsthand how underfunded preparedness programs leave communities vulnerable. The 2023 national readiness report (which mainstream media ignored) showed that 68% of local emergency systems couldn't handle even moderate-scale incidents. We need sustainable funding for civil defense - it's not about fear, it's about responsible citizenship. #PreparednessMatters #DutyOverPartisanship
